name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.PulsarTrigger
description: PulsarTrigger refers to the specification of the Pulsar trigger.

authAthenzParams.name:
Authentication athenz parameters for the pulsar client.
Refer https://github.com/apache/pulsar-client-go/blob/master/pulsar/auth/athenz.go
Either token or athenz can be set to use auth.
+optional

authAthenzSecret.name:
Authentication athenz privateKey secret for the pulsar client.
AuthAthenzSecret must be set if AuthAthenzParams is used.
+optional

authTokenSecret.name:
Authentication token for the pulsar client.
Either token or athenz can be set to use auth.
+optional

connectionBackoff.name:
Backoff holds parameters applied to connection.
+optional

parameters.description: Parameters is the list of parameters that is applied to resolved Kafka trigger object.

payload.description: Payload is the list of key-value extracted from an event payload to construct the request payload.

tls.name:
TLS configuration for the pulsar client.
+optional

tlsAllowInsecureConnection.name:
Whether the Pulsar client accept untrusted TLS certificate from broker.
+optional

tlsValidateHostname.name:
Whether the Pulsar client verify the validity of the host name from broker.
+optional

url.name:
Configure the service URL for the Pulsar service.
+required
